debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ ContDiffOn ℝ (↑⊤) (Φ₄' r) upperHalfPlaneSet

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp [Φ₃'_def, Φ₄'_def]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  
  rw [h₁]
  -- Prove that Φ₃' r is smooth on the upper half-plane (using Φ₃'_contDiffOn_ℂ)
  have h₂ : ContDiffOn ℝ ∞ (Φ₃' r) ℍ₀ := by
    -- Use the fact that Φ₃' r is smooth on ℂ (from Φ₃'_contDiffOn_ℂ)
    -- and hence smooth when considered as a real function.
    have h₃ : ContDiffOn ℂ ∞ (Φ₃' r) ℍ₀ := Φ₃'_contDiffOn_ℂ
    -- Use the fact that a complex smooth function is real smooth.
    have h₄ : ContDiffOn ℝ ∞ (Φ₃' r) ℍ₀ := by
      -- Use the fact that a complex smooth function is real smooth.
      have h₅ : ContDiffOn ℝ ∞ (Φ₃' r) ℍ₀ := by
        -- Use the fact that a complex smooth function is real smooth by forgetting the complex structure.
        exact contDiffOn_of_contDiffOn_smul h₃
      exact h₅
    exact h₄
  exact h₂
